scripts.check: bun run lint && turbo run typecheck test test:integration test:conversion test:fidelity
scripts.check:full:parallel: bun run lint && turbo run typecheck test test:integration test:conversion test:fidelity test:e2e --concurrency=100% --output-logs=errors-only
scripts.tier2: bun run tier1 && turbo run test:perf:regression:unit test:health:unit test:health test:e2e
scripts.sample-regression:
printf '
  Ad-hoc sampling for architectural CRDT residual + perf regressions
  (see specs/2026-04-19-ci-signal-quality/ and AGENTS.md §Measurement scripts)

  bun run measure:fuzz   --seeds <N> --context "<why>"
  bun run measure:stress --seed  <N> --context "<why>"

  gh workflow run nightly.yml    # perf regression + parse-health gates
  gh workflow run weekly.yml     # elevated-sample PBT (STRESS_FIDELITY=1)

  Results append to specs/2026-04-16-bridge-correctness/evidence/residual-measurements.jsonl
  (JSONL + git history is the trend record).

'
